channel.title: 2026-03-21 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-21 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: [ASAP] High-Entropy Spinel Gallate Photocatalyst for Visible-Light-Driven Water Oxidation
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Meiyun Li, Lejuan Cai, Hao Ling, Zheheng Huang, Lisha Lu, Renjie Li, Yuanfang Feng, Muhua Sun, Xuedong Bai, and Wenlong Wang
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00479

item.title: [ASAP] Nuclear Quantum Effects Sustain Cooperative Hydride Ion Migration and Restore Arrhenius Behavior in Pnma LaH3–x
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Ziqi Wang, Hujun Cao, and Yong Pei
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00094

item.title: [ASAP] Persistent Orbital Magnetism from Light-Induced Attosecond Charge Migration in Linear Molecules
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Jean Christophe Tremblay and Gopal Dixit
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00139

item.title: [ASAP] Pressure-Induced Discovery of a Topological Phase of Bi4Br4 with AA′′-Stacking
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Honglin Li, Fuyi Wang, Zhenyu Wang, Lu Li, Wencheng Lu, Qing Tian, Hongjian Zhao, Wei Zhang, Jian Lv, Haijun Zhang, Pengyue Gao, and Yanchao Wang
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00232

item.title: [ASAP] Quantum Confinement Emissions in Strained Monolayer WSe2: A Nanoscale Approach to Single-Photon Emitters via Tip-Enhanced Techniques
item.description:
📚 ACS Nano: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Lucas Liberal, Rafael Battistella Nadas, Gustavo H. R. Soares, Frederico B. Sousa, Maria Clara Godinho, Gabriel Marques Jacobsen, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Marcio Daldin Teodoro, Ado Jorio, and Leonardo Cristiano Campos
ACS Nano DOI: 10.1021/acsnano.5c18642

item.title: Chiral Metal Halide Perovskites for Spin‐Polarized Light‐Emitting Diodes

📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Ashish Gaurav, Jihyun Kim, Nadesh Fiuza‐Maneiro, Hongki Kim, Hae‐Jun Seok, Sergio Gómez Grana, Robert L. Z. Hoye, Lakshminarayana Polavarapu, Matthew J. Fuchter
Advanced Materials, EarlyView.

Advanced Science, EarlyView.

👤 Chong Guo, Weiqi Qian, Huiyu Dan, Yaning Xu, Lan Xu, Chris R. Bowen, Ya Yang

item.title: [ASAP] An Algorithm for Atom-Centered Lossy Compression of the Atomic Orbital Basis in Density Functional Theory Calculations
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Anthony O. Lara, Justin J. Talbot, Zhe Wang, and Martin Head-Gordon
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.5c01988
